mapper.select: SELECT twi.*, twi.workplace_nm as name, -- 공통 컴포넌트 (i-card-image 사용용도) sf1.file_id as thumbnail_id FROM esg.tb_workplace_info twi -- 파일 정보 매핑 LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf1 on sf1.target_id = twi.workplace_id and sf1.target_type = 'workplaceThumbnail' AND sf1.comp_id = #{compId} WHERE 1 = 1 AND twi.comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY twi.use_yn DESC, twi.ord_seq ASC, twi.workplace_id DESC

SELECT twi.*, twi.workplace_nm AS name, -- 공통 컴포넌트 (i-card-image 사용용도) sf1.file_id AS thumbnail_id FROM esg.tb_workplace_info twi -- 파일 정보 매핑 LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf1 ON sf1.target_id = twi.workplace_id AND sf1.target_type = 'workplaceThumbnail' AND sf1.comp_id = #{compId} WHERE 1=1 AND workplace_id = #{searchText}
mapper.insert:
select to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad( (coalesce(max(substring(workplace_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text, 4, '0' ) as workplace_id from esg.tb_workplace_info where workplace_id like to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') || '%'
INSERT INTO esg.tb_workplace_info ( comp_id, workplace_id, workplace_nm, workplace_area, workplace_alias, ord_seq, remark, created_at, created_by, use_yn ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{workplaceId}, #{workplaceNm}, #{workplaceArea}, #{workplaceAlias}, #{ordSeq}, #{remark}, now(), #{createdBy}, #{useYn} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_workplace_info SET workplace_nm = #{workplaceNm}, workplace_area = #{workplaceArea}, workplace_alias = #{workplaceAlias}, ord_seq = #{ordSeq}, remark = #{remark}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE workplace_id = #{workplaceId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM esg.tb_workplace_info WHERE 1=1 AND workplace_id = #{workplaceId}

SELECT twm.* , twm.workplace_id as id , twi.workplace_nm as nm FROM esg.tb_workplace_map twm LEFT JOIN esg.tb_workplace_info twi on twi.workplace_id = twm.workplace_id WHERE 1=1 AND twm.target_id = #{targetId} AND twm.target_type = #{targetType}

SELECT twm.* , twm.workplace_id as id , twi.workplace_nm as nm FROM esg.tb_workplace_map twm LEFT JOIN esg.tb_workplace_info twi on twi.workplace_id = twm.workplace_id WHERE 1=1 AND twm.target_id = #{targetId} AND twm.target_type = #{targetType} AND twm.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY twm.workplace_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_workplace_map ( target_type, target_id, workplace_id, created_at, created_by, use_yn ) VALUES ( #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{id}, now(), #{createdBy}, #{useYn} )
